{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221908269674F3D8EC64E9735A1D"}"},"total":1061},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618561296948855577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，有人性，不是机器人，也不是魔头畜生，胜过百分之90的小说，作者加油，撑起苍穹的脊梁，必是人间最璀璨的光！加油作者，你很棒👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":11,"text":"机器人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177706E9735A1D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618561296948855577%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576951862738308120%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773838938,"group_id":"7576951862738308120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我想在小说里造一个自己的世界，不为赚钱，只为成长和爱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7brdm+N1btytb8MVQ4Q3cZSjyUOqlkOvQHdcFVU5ITb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c55049d536ad46ecbd71242cb50428b2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710473&x-signature=bzNy%2Beuz2BFlGjti8fYF7Ihfdi4%3D","user_id":"1607961683954596","user_name":"谦清子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1607961683954596","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":9,"fan_ranklist_title":"界海主","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576951862738308120","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流 + 极道武学 + 极致加点 + 杀伐果断】
世界是一棵倒生长的树，众生皆是树根下的蝼蚁。
为了从混沌底层爬向树冠神域，季夜在轮回中挣扎了百世。
这一世，他碾碎了所有的防御与退路，让绝对的力量，成为他唯一的权柄！
天赋叠加系统，开启！
三倍【蛮力】，让他徒手撕裂钢铁机甲，肉身硬抗核爆冲击。
三倍【悟性】，让他一眼看穿仙帝破绽，凡人之躯逆斩神明。
三倍【杀意】，让他化身移动的天灾，所过之处，寸草不生。
在这吃人的诸天万界，犹豫就会败北，仁慈就是自杀。
从武侠到仙侠，从科幻到神话。
他不仅要拿SSS评价，他还要把这高高在上的天道，拽下来踩在脚下！
当诸天神佛都在颤抖时，那个青衫落拓的身影，正站在尸山血海之上，对整个世界宣告：
“记住，我叫季夜。永夜的夜。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2e87b744f2361fa46cf6045cc982e7be","author":"宇宙引擎","author_id":"","book_id":"7576951862738308120","book_name":"无限：只有我能叠加天赋","book_short_name":"无限轮回之驱除鞑虏","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576951927565468184","read_count":"68818","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"679185"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"215","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无限流,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d12a6c37b209ba276b779a38837c7ae7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361706&x-signature=L%2Fbgr9ZQ2wMqiZ3qAac5nYeG7IQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1152724971033144","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221908269674F3D8EC64E9735A1D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du
